problem: How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure?
mechanism: Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure)
hypothesis: How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Two-dimensional. Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure) directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 17 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
